title: [codereview-P2] Conference test bypasses radio layer and medium stress testing
description: The new test_500_node_conference only uses sim.add_node/remove_node/set_position but does not exercise the radio propagation, collisions, SCHC, or RPL in dense conference setting. Stress test incomplete. See python/tests/sim/test_scale.py:340. Add transmissions using SimRadio or sim.start_transmission for some nodes. Reference test_topology_scenarios.py:100 for pattern. Also add random.seed(42) for reproducibility.
